AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: This is a localized about page.

Hero.title: Your music. Your rules.
Hero.description: A local music player with smart search for Deezer and SoundCloud. Download tracks and listen offline.

Features.title: WHY EXØS
Features.description: Fast search, local library, and synchronous lyrics without unnecessary noise.

search.title: Smart Search
search.description: Search tracks simultaneously on Deezer and SoundCloud. Preview before downloading.

download.title: Download all
download.description: Save tracks locally and listen offline from SoundCloud or Deezer.

lyrics.title: Synchronous Lyrics
lyrics.description: Enjoy real-time lyrics while listening to your favorite tracks.

Sources.title: Sources
Sources.description: Choose between the rich database of Deezer and the speed of SoundCloud.

Faq.title: FAQ
Faq.description: EXØS is a non-commercial technical demonstration designed to showcase web development architecture and complex API integrations.

time.question: Why does it take time to load?
time.answer: We do not host any music. Every time you hit «Play», the system fetches and processes the audio stream from public sources in real-time. This «on-the-fly» processing requires a few moments for connection and buffering.

music-store.question: Where is the music stored?
music-store.answer: Nowhere. EXØS does not host or store any media files on its servers. All content is streamed directly from public third-party sources in real-time upon your request. Think of us as a sophisticated interface, not a storage.

legal.question: Is this legal?
legal.answer: This project is a non-commercial technical demonstration (Technical Showcase). It was built to highlight modern web architecture and API integration. We do not monetize, distribute, or claim ownership of any content.

registration.question: Why do I need an account?
registration.answer: Registration is free, it allows you to sync your settings, preferences, and listening history across all your devices. We believe in a seamless experience.

privacy.question: What about my privacy?
privacy.answer: Secure authentication. Zero tracking. Your data is yours. We only store the minimum information required to keep your personal settings and playlists synced. No tracking, no ads.

provisions.title: 1. General Provisions
items: 1.1. This document governs your use of the EXØS web application ('Service').
1.2. By accessing or using the Service, you acknowledge that you have read and agreed to these Terms. If you do not agree, please stop using the Service.
1.3. EXØS is a non-commercial technical showcase built to demonstrate advanced web architecture and API integration capabilities.

description.title: 2. Service Description
items: 2.1. EXØS provides a unified interface for searching and aggregating music metadata.
2.2. The Service is not a content provider, does not host any media files, and does not store audio content on its servers.
2.3. Audio playback is facilitated via real-time dynamic stream retrieval from public third-party sources upon individual user requests.

thirdParty.title: 3. Third-Party Data Usage
items: 3.1. To display track information (titles, artists, covers), the Service utilizes public APIs from platforms such as Deezer and SoundCloud.
3.2. All third-party trademarks and logos belong to their respective owners and are used for informational purposes only.

copyright.title: 4. Intellectual Property & DMCA
items: 4.1. All rights to music compositions, lyrics, and artwork remain with their respective copyright holders.
4.2. EXØS respects intellectual property rights. If you are a copyright owner and wish to request the removal of specific content, please contact us via GitHub or email.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
items: 5.1. The Service is provided on an 'as is' and 'as available' basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted access to content, as it depends on third-party availability.
5.2. Users are solely responsible for their personal use of the content in compliance with applicable laws.

collection.title: 1. Data Collection
collection.description: We maintain a minimal data collection policy. When creating an account, we store only your email address and username.

storage.title: 2. Synchronization & Storage
storage.description: The Service stores your UI preferences, playlists, and listening history. This data is used exclusively to provide a seamless experience across multiple devices.

security.title: 3. Security
security.description: Data security is a priority. We employ industry-standard encryption and secure storage protocols for authentication (password hashing). Your data is never shared with third parties.
